title: Create: Let's become a real train controller
description: You can become a real train controller with this mod.
body:
You can become a real train controller with this mod.

You must use this mod with create mod.

<How to use>

The train operation method used is that of Japanese trains.

You manipulate the acceleration. The train moves with that acceleration.
Pressing the w key decreases the acceleration.
Pressing the s key increases the acceleration.
N indicates a state in which the speed remains almost unchanged, B indicates deceleration, and P indicates acceleration; the larger the number, the greater the absolute value of the acceleration.
The absolute value of the acceleration for P4 and B4 will match the acceleration set on the Create settings screen.
If you press the p key, you can open the setting, but it's experimental.
